title: hieracium serratum subsp. serratum
intro: Hieracium serratum subsp. serratum, also known as saw-wort or serrated hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium serratum subsp. serratum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as arthritis, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
